welcome.title: Welcome to Style Atelier!
welcome.description: Would you like to start the interactive guide to learn how to use it?
welcome.skip: Skip (You can start it later from the Guide button)

steps.title: 1. History to Panel
steps.description: Drag and drop any generated image from Midjourney directly into the History tab of the Side Panel to import it.

steps.title: 2. Mint Your Card
steps.description: Click the 'Mint' button on the imported history item to start crafting your custom Style Card.

steps.title: 3. Name Your Creation
steps.description: Enter a descriptive and unique title for your new card. This helps you identify and search for it later in your Library.

steps.title: 4. Parameter Slotting
steps.description: Select specific segments of your prompt text to convert them into editable 'Slots' (variables).

steps.title: 5. Choose Rarity
steps.description: Assign a rarity tier to your card. Premium rarities feature stunning visual designs and holographic frames in the Library.

steps.title: 6. Add to Your Hand
steps.description: Simply click any Style Card in your Library. It will instantly move to your HandBar at the bottom of the screen.

steps.title: 7. Edit in Workbench
steps.description: Navigate to the Workbench tab to customize the variables of your cards, combine different styles, and generate final prompt strings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.easyModeDesc: Simplifies the UI by showing only the Library tab. You can return to Settings anytime via the gear icon.
settings.easyModeToggleSub: Hide tabs to focus on Style Card management
settings.gdriveSyncDesc: Backup your local style cards and binders to Google Drive. Keep your decks safe and load them on other devices.
settings.syncTimeout: Sync timed out. Please check your network connection.
settings.restoreConfirmMsg: Force recover database from Google Drive. This will completely overwrite all local data. Your current cards and configurations will be lost forever. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
settings.securityNote: Credentials are never saved in the extension. They are only used for temporary access during backup and restore operations.
settings.storageDesc: Check database usage and limit in the browser.
settings.storageWarning90Desc: Adding new cards or restoring may fail. Please clear history or delete unused cards.
settings.storageWarning80Desc: Consider clearing history or exporting a backup to free up space.
settings.clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all prompt history? (Style Cards and Categories will not be deleted)
settings.localBackupDesc: Export your style cards and binders to a local JSON file, or restore from a previously exported backup file. Perfect for offline migrations or keeping absolute privacy.
settings.importConfirm: Restore (merge) data from local file. Conflicting data will resolve to the newer modification date. Proceed?
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the database? This will delete all style cards and prompt history.
settings.importSuccess: Database restored from local JSON file successfully!
settings.privacyNote: Data is processed entirely in the browser and local environment. It is never sent to any external server and works offline.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Reset the database to its pristine state, or force recover database from Google Drive by overwriting local changes.
settings.expertFeaturesDesc: Select which advanced features to enable in Expert Mode.
settings.featureStackSub: Merge pinned cards to create new cards
settings.featureSlotSub: Turn prompt segments into editable variables
settings.featureRaritySub: Assign and filter cards by rarity levels
settings.featureTagsSub: Add custom tags to cards for easy searching
settings.featureMultiCardSub: Pin and mix multiple cards on the workbench
settings.featureCardEditingSub: Edit the name, prompt, and parameters of created cards
settings.featureMultiImageSub: Select up to 4 images for the card thumbnail grid
settings.tipsBarToggleSub: Show a cycling tips bar at the bottom of the screen
settings.autoBackupDesc: Automatically backups data on change and reflects updates from other devices.
settings.cleanupHistoryDesc: * Removing unused Style Cards from the library can also free up significant storage, especially for cards with high-resolution images.
settings.deleteCardMessage: This action cannot be undone. "{{cardName}}" will be permanently deleted from the library.

helpTooltips.stack: Stack: Merge two or more style cards from your hand. You can choose a representative card and combine their usage counts to evolve your styles.
helpTooltips.slot: Slot: Click on prompt segments to turn them into editable variable slots on the Workbench. Helpful for parameters you change frequently.
helpTooltips.rarity: Rarity: Assigning higher rarity levels unlocks visual effects and premium frames in your Library.
helpTooltips.tags: Tags: Add search tags to categorize and filter your style cards in the Library.
helpTooltips.categories: Category: Organize your cards into custom categories (binders). You can manage them in the settings tab.
helpTooltips.multiCard: Multi-card: Pin multiple cards on the Workbench to blend their prompt segments, sref, and other parameters together.
helpTooltips.cardEditing: Card Editing: Allows modifying the name, prompt bubbles, and parameter options of your created style cards.
helpTooltips.multiImage: Multi-image: Select up to 4 images to create a dynamic thumbnail grid for your style card.

categoryManager.clickToUseThumb: Click on a Style Card below to use its thumbnail as the icon for this category.
categoryManager.listDescription: List of custom and system categories. Custom categories can be edited or deleted.
categoryManager.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{name}"? All style cards in this category will be reassigned to "No Category".
categoryManager.errDeleteFailed: Failed to delete category. Please try again.
categoryManager.alertAlreadyExists: A category with this name already exists.
categoryManager.errUpdateFailed: Failed to update category. Please try again.
categoryManager.errAddFailed: Failed to add category. Please try again.

dragAndDrop.noQrCode: No QR code found in the image.
dragAndDrop.invalidCardData: Invalid card data in QR code or corrupted.
dragAndDrop.dropOverlay: Drop QR Card Image to Import
dragAndDrop.dropHistoryOverlay: Drop here to add to prompt history

share.blockedCopy: Browser blocked clipboard copy. Try opening the image page.
share.rightClickHint: Right click to copy or save
share.tip: Tip: You can paste the copied card image directly into chat apps like Discord, or post it to X (Twitter). The card includes an embedded QR code that anyone can scan to import this style into their own Style Atelier workspace.
share.noCardId: No card ID provided in URL parameters.
share.cardNotFound: Style card not found in database.
share.clipboardSuccess: Copied card image to clipboard! You can now paste it into Discord, X, etc.
share.clipboardBlocked: Browser blocked clipboard write. Right click the image and select 'Copy image'.
share.clipboardFailed: Failed to copy image to clipboard.

interactiveTutorial.autoAdvanceHint: Perform the action or click 'Next' to proceed

historyTab.emptyDesc: Drag and drop any generated image from Midjourney directly into the History tab of the Side Panel to import it.

libraryTab.emptyDesc: Drag and drop images from the History tab of this panel to create your own style cards!
libraryTab.notFoundDesc: Change or clear your search terms or filters.
libraryTab.searchPlaceholder: Search by tag, name or sref...

workbench.addPromptDesc: Add style cards to Workbench from Library
workbench.evolveNeedMore: Need more uses to evolve this card
workbench.emptyDesc: Pin style cards from the Library tab to start blending styles or evolving cards.
workbench.step1Desc: Send your favorite styles from Library to the Workbench.
workbench.step2Desc: Blend with 2 or more cards, or adjust prompt and evolve based on usage with a single card.
workbench.step3Desc: Send prompt directly to chat using the 'Try on Midjourney' button.
workbench.evolutionSuccessDesc: Your style card has evolved to a higher tier!

mergeStack.title: Merge Card Stack
mergeStack.description: Select one card to keep as the base recipe. Choose whether to consume the other cards to inherit their usage counts.

steps.title: 1. Drag & Drop into History
steps.description:
Drag and drop any generated image from Midjourney directly into the History tab of this panel.
You can also add a sample image for testing.

steps.title: 2. Click Mint Button
steps.description: Click the 'Mint Card' button on the imported history item to start crafting your card.

steps.title: 3. Name Your Creation
steps.description: Select keywords or enter a custom name to set the card title. Click 'Next' when done.

steps.title: 4. Select Slots
steps.description: Click prompt bubbles to convert them into 'Slots' (editable variables on the Workbench). Click 'Next' when done.

steps.title: 5. Choose Rarity
steps.description: Assign a rarity tier (Common / Rare / Epic / Legendary) to your card. Click 'Next' when done.

steps.title: 6. Save Your Card
steps.description: Click 'Save Card' to register it in your Library.

steps.title: 7. Send Card to Workbench
steps.description: Click the style card in your Library to add it to the HandBar and sync with the Workbench. Click 'Next' when done.

steps.title: 8. Edit in Workbench
steps.description: Switch to the Workbench tab to customize variable slots and send prompts to Midjourney. That's it!

tipsList: 💡 Use Stack to merge multiple cards and evolve your styles.
💡 Convert prompt segments to Slots to define editable variables.
💡 Add custom tags to cards for fast and organized searching.
💡 Premium rarities feature stunning visual designs and holographic frames.
💡 Drag & Drop any Midjourney image directly into History to start minting.

alerts.handFullDesc: You can only pin up to 7 cards. Please unpin another card first.
alerts.disconnectedDesc: The extension has lost connection to the page. This usually happens after an update or prolonged inactivity.
alerts.noInputDesc: Could not find the chat input. Please ensure you are on the "Create" page or the Midjourney gallery details view.
